title: Easy NPC: Core
description: Provides the core functionallity for the Easy NPC mod.
body: # 🧠 Easy NPC: Core The _**Easy NPC: Core**_ includes the foundational logic for the _Easy NPC_ mod. It provides the essential backend systems used by other Easy NPC modules. ## 🔧 What It Does - 📦 **Includes** the core _Easy NPC_ functionality. - ⚙️ **Provides** shared backend logic and infrastructure. - 🧩 **Required by** modules like: - `easy_npc-config-ui` - `easy_npc-bundle` ## 👨‍💻 Who Should Use This? This module is best suited for: - 🖥️ **Server owners** - 🧪 **Mod developers** - 🧪 **Modpack developers** - 🔧 **Advanced users or multiplayer environments** Use this version if you **don’t need** a built-in configuration UI or want tighter control over how Easy NPC is integrated. ## 🙅 Not for Regular Players > ⚠️ Most players should use the **bundled version**, which includes a user-friendly config UI. > 👉 Available at: [modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc](https://modrinth.com/mod/easy-npc) ## ✅ Can Be Used Standalone While it **can** be used on its own, it's primarily designed as a modular backend for more complex setups. ## Introduction & Overview Video (English)
